title: Transcription

view.empty: No transcript yet. Start recording to see transcription here.

player.timestamp_jump_tooltip: Click timestamp to jump to that audio position

recovery.title: Recover Unsaved Transcript
recovery.description: We found a previous session that did not finish. Recover it?
recovery.dialog_description_one: We found 1 meeting that was interrupted. Select a meeting to preview and recover it.

recovery.alert_delete_failed: Failed to delete meeting. Please try again.
recovery.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this meeting? This cannot be undone.
